---
title: "Blog"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Perspective, tutoriale și noutăți de la echipa noastră"
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
  feed: true
  grid-columns: 3
page-layout: custom
toc: false
site-url: https://chen.ist/ro
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="blog-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Blogul <span class="gr">Nostru</span></h1>
    <p>Perspective asupra securității cibernetice, ghiduri open-source și analize de infrastructură de la echipa noastră.</p>
    <div class="blog-bar">
      <div class="blog-lang-switch">
        <a href="/blog.html">EN</a>
        <a href="/ro/blog.html" class="active">RO</a>
        <a href="/sv/blogg.html">SV</a>
        <a href="/de/blog.html">DE</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="blog-featured">
  <a href="/ro/blog/open-source-europe-nextcloud-libreoffice.html" class="blog-featured-card" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
    <div class="blog-featured-img">
      <img src="/assets/images/stock/cloud-sky.webp" alt="Open Source în Europa" loading="lazy">
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="blog-featured-tag"><i class="bi bi-star-fill" style="font-size:0.6rem;"></i> Cel mai recent</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-title">Open-Source în Europa: Nextcloud și LibreOffice</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-desc">Studii de caz reale ale guvernelor europene care adoptă open-source. De la Bundescloud la strategia digitală a Franței.</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-meta">
        <span><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 26 martie 2026</span>
        <span><i class="bi bi-tag"></i> Open Source, Europa</span>
      </div>
      <span class="blog-featured-link">Citește articolul</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

<div style="max-width:1200px; margin:2rem auto 0; padding:0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); padding-bottom:0.75rem;">
    <span style="font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#86868b;">Toate Articolele</span>
    <a href="/ro/blog.xml" style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.3rem; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:500; color:#f26522; text-decoration:none;"><i class="bi bi-rss"></i> RSS</a>
  </div>
</div>

```

::: {.container style="margin-bottom:3rem;"}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="blog-cta" style="padding:5rem 2rem;">
  <div class="container">
    <div style="width:36px;height:3px;background:#81BD4A;margin:0 auto 2rem;border-radius:2px;opacity:0.6;"></div>
    <h2>Rămâi informat</h2>
    <p>Abonează-te la fluxul nostru RSS, newsletter sau urmărește-ne pentru cele mai noi articole.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/ro/blog.xml" class="m-b" style="background:#f26522;"><i class="bi bi-rss me-2"></i>Abonare RSS</a>
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="m-b" style="background:#ff6719;"><i class="bi bi-envelope me-2"></i>Substack</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chenistsec" target="_blank" class="m-bo"><i class="bi bi-linkedin me-2"></i>Urmărește-ne</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```
